rationale: Semantic non-entailment (|/=) is the negation of def:log-consequence, which was missing. Same shape as 0026.
notes: Counterexample structure (def:structure) is the actual proof witness but is not statement-licensed (no domain phrase here), so flagged not added -- mirroring 0026. The edge to the converse thm:universal-implies-existential is a contrast pairing, not a used proof step; reviewer may drop it.
